== Notes for [[Item:Q85219|Q85219]] ==

Source 1: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd-al-Rahman_ibn_Awf

Source 2: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ibrahim_bin_%27Abdur-Rahman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E314557C351EFBC189822EF79916C48DE
geni:6000000021141679048

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
